CardComp.

scan-to-comp
3,914 real cards, 27 sets (Base 1999 → 2026). Tap any result for TCGplayer prices + your bid/margin grid. Drop a prices.json (from ingest.py → TCGCSV) beside this file and it uses that instantly, same-origin — no API. Until then it falls back to a pokemontcg.io stand-in, which needs your deployed link.
